message:
🌱 Add minio: The cluster is restarted successfully only when all nodes mission (#1358)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "minio-6995-the-cluster-is-restarted-successfully-only-when-all-nodes-are-started",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "minio: The cluster is restarted successfully only when all nodes are started.",
+    "description": "The cluster is restarted successfully only when all nodes are started.. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current minio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your minio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nhelm list -n minio 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working minio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review minio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant minio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl get configmap -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio\n```\nDocker swarm node on one node,  each service has its own volume"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for The cluster is restarted successfully only when all nodes…",
+        "description": "Avoid waiting perpetually for DNS resolution\n```yaml\ndocker stack deploy --compose-file=docker-compose.yaml   minio_test\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl get events -n minio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"The cluster is restarted successfully only when all nodes…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/minio/minio/pull/7355",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "docker stack deploy --compose-file=docker-compose.yaml   minio_test",
+        "docker service scale  minio_test_minio6=0 minio_test_minio5=0",
+        "docker service scale  minio_test_minio5=1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "minio",
+      "community",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },
